headline: Steel Dynamics Weighs BlueScope Deal As New Aluminum Assets Come Online
summary: Steel Dynamics, together with SGH, has submitted a non binding offer to acquire 100% of BlueScope Steel. The company has commissioned a new recycled aluminum flat rolled products mill and two satellite slab centers. Steel Dynamics has also completed the acquisition of the remaining interest in New Process Steel. For investors watching NasdaqGS:STLD, these moves come as the stock trades around $193.13, with a 1 year return of 50.1% and a 5 year return of 335.1%. Over shorter windows, the...
